children.name: Roots of Yggdrasil Top Left Switch Gate (A-1)
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(RoYTopLeft) and (CanUse(Rolling Shuriken) or CanUse(Earth Spear) or CanUse(Caltrops) or CanUse(Bomb))

children.name: Gate of the Dead Wedjat Gate (F-5)
Dark Star Lord's Mausoleum Pyramid
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMPyramid) and (Has(Pyramid Crystal) and Has(Destiny Tablet) and CanChant(Heaven) and CanChant(Moon) and CanChant(Fire) and CanChant(Sea) and CanChant(Sun))

children.name: Heavens Labyrinth Gate (D-1)
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(HLGate) and ((Has(Feather) or Has(Grapple Claw)) and IsDead(Griffin) and IsDead(Arachne) and IsDead(Scylla))

children.name: Takamagahara Shrine Neck
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(TSNeckEntrance) and (CanChant(Earth) and CanChant(Wind) and CanChant(Fire) and CanChant(Sea) and CanChant(Heaven) and CanWarp)

children.name: Icefire Treetop Under Ratatoskr Soul Gate (G-3)

access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(SotFGBalor) and (Has(Claydoll Suit) and (GuardianKills(5) or Setting(Random Soul Gates)) and IsDead(Balor))
